title: Successful management of a complicated forearm fracture in a patient w
summary: Presenting case of a 1-year-old girl, diagnosed with CIPA complaining of wound discharge and fever from a previously repaired left forearm fracture with nails.

title: Thirona, COPD Foundation partner to advance AI-driven phenotyping
summary: By leveraging advanced image quantification, the study will help unlock more profound insights into the heterogeneity of COPD.

title: College Student Had Headaches, Diagnosed With Acute Myeloid Leukemia
summary: Breeze Hunter thought she had a lingering cold. When her symptoms got worse, she was diagnosed with a rare form of cancer: acute myeloid leukemia.

title: Brothers share lifelong bond after kidney donation
summary: In 1975 Séamus Fitzpatrick donated a kidney to his brother Seán in what was the seventh successful kidney transplant in Ireland. 50 years on, the brothers continue to share a close bond.

title: Diets high in fat and sugar appear to harm cognitive function
summary: Consuming a Western-style diet packed with sugar and saturated fats may hurt your brain, not just your waistline. A new study shows poorer performance on spatial memory tasks among people with diets high in processed, unhealthy foods.

title: Solution to 'cocktail party problem' could help people with hearing loss
summary: Researchers drew inspiration from the auditory system to design a solution for the "cocktail party problem."

title: Mpox death toll in Africa surpasses 1,750 since 2024: Africa CDC
summary: Mpox death toll in Africa surpasses 1,750 since 2024: Africa CDC-

title: Autism diagnoses are on the rise - but autism itself may not be
summary: Autism is better known and diagnosed than ever before, leading to misconceptions that cases are skyrocketing.

title: US approves first at-home cervical cancer screening device
summary: The US Food and Drug Administration has approved an at-home cervical cancer screening tool as an alternative to Pap smears by a gynecologist, the company behind the device said Friday.

title: Nana's favourite broth recipe is having a moment, but what are the benefits?
summary: Celebrities like Gwyneth Paltrow, Kylie Jenner and Salma Hayek swear by it. Dr Catherine Conlan asks whether bone broth is worth the hype.
